Nudist_0.Name: Nudist
Nudist_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} enjoys the feeling of freedom that comes from being nude. {PAWN_pronoun} can handle clothing, but will be happier without it.

Bloodlust_0.Name: Bloodlust
Bloodlust_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} gets a rush from hurting people, and never minds the sight of blood or death. {PAWN_pronoun} is four times as likely to start a social fight as others.

Kind_0.Name: Kind
Kind_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is an exceptionally agreeable and giving person {PAWN_pronoun} rarely insults others and will sometimes offer kind words to brighten the moods of those around {PAWN_objective} {PAWN_pronoun} also never judges people by their appearance {PAWN_possessive} agreeableness also makes {PAWN_objective} more likely to conform to prevailing opinions.

Psychopath_0.Name: Psychopath
Psychopath_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has no empathy The suffering of others doesn't bother {PAWN_objective} at all {PAWN_pronoun} doesn't mind if others are butchered, left unburied, imprisoned, or sold to slavery - unless it affects {PAWN_objective} {PAWN_pronoun} also feels no mood boost from socializing.

Cannibal_0.Name: Cannibal
Cannibal_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} was taught that eating human meat is wrong and horrible. But one time, long ago, {PAWN_pronoun} tried it... and {PAWN_pronoun} liked it.

Abrasive_0.Name: Abrasive
Abrasive_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} always says exactly what's on {PAWN_possessive} mind, especially if it's bugging {PAWN_objective}. That tends to rub people the wrong way.

TooSmart_0.Name: Too smart
TooSmart_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is too smart for {PAWN_possessive} own good. {PAWN_pronoun} learns everything much faster than everyone, but can be quite eccentric.

Brawler_0.Name: Brawler
Brawler_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes to fight up close and personal. {PAWN_possessive} accuracy is greatly increased in melee combat, but {PAWN_pronoun}'ll be very unhappy if asked to carry a ranged weapon.

Masochist_0.Name: Masochist
Masochist_0.Description: For {PAWN_nameDef}, there's something exciting about getting hurt. {PAWN_pronoun} doesn't know why, {PAWN_pronoun}'s just wired differently.

NightOwl_0.Name: Night owl
NightOwl_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes to be up during the night, and sleep during the day {PAWN_pronoun} gets a mood bonus if awake at night (23h-6h) and mood loss if awake during the day (11h-18h) {PAWN_pronoun} doesn't get a mood penalty for being in the dark.

Greedy_0.Name: Greedy
Greedy_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} needs a really impressive bedroom. {PAWN_pronoun} gets a mood loss if {PAWN_pronoun} doesn't get what {PAWN_pronoun} wants.

Jealous_0.Name: Jealous
Jealous_0.Description: For {PAWN_nameDef}, it's degrading to have a less impressive bedroom than someone else. {PAWN_pronoun} gets a mood loss if any colonist has a more impressive bedroom.

Ascetic_0.Name: Ascetic
Ascetic_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has forsaken physical comforts and enjoyments in favor of a simple, pure lifestyle {PAWN_pronoun} will become unhappy if {PAWN_pronoun} has a bedroom that's too impressive {PAWN_pronoun} also dislikes fancy food and prefers to eat raw {PAWN_pronoun} never judges others by their appearance.

Gay_0.Name: Gay
Gay_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is romantically attracted to people of {PAWN_possessive} own gender.

Bisexual_0.Name: Bisexual
Bisexual_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is romantically attracted to both men and women.

Asexual_0.Name: Asexual
Asexual_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has no sexual attraction to anyone at all.

AnnoyingVoice_0.Name: Annoying voice
AnnoyingVoice_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s voice has a particularly grating, nasal quality to it, and {PAWN_pronoun} tends to talk in barked, garbled phrases. This predisposes others to dislike {PAWN_objective}.

CreepyBreathing_0.Name: Creepy breathing
CreepyBreathing_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} breathes heavily all the time, and sweats constantly. People find it creepy.

Pyromaniac_0.Name: Pyromaniac
Pyromaniac_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} loves fire {PAWN_pronoun} will never extinguish fires, and will occasionally go on random fire starting sprees {PAWN_pronoun} will be happy around flames, and happier when wielding an incendiary weapon.

Wimp_0.Name: Wimp
Wimp_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is weak and cowardly. Even a little pain will immobilize {PAWN_objective}.

Nimble_0.Name: Nimble
Nimble_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has remarkable kinesthetic intelligence. {PAWN_pronoun} seems to dance around danger with preternatural grace.

FastLearner_0.Name: Fast learner
FastLearner_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a knack for learning. {PAWN_pronoun} picks things up much faster than others.

SlowLearner_0.Name: Slow learner
SlowLearner_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is slow on the uptake. {PAWN_pronoun} learns much slower than others.

Undergrounder_0.Name: Undergrounder
Undergrounder_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has no need to experience the outdoors or light {PAWN_pronoun} will never feel cooped up or get cabin fever and is not bothered by darkness However, {PAWN_nameDef} will be unhappy while outdoors.

Transhumanist_0.Name: Body mod
Transhumanist_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} feels limited in {PAWN_possessive} feeble human body. {PAWN_pronoun} often dreams of being enhanced with artificial body parts or xenogenetics.

BodyPurist_0.Name: Body purist
BodyPurist_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} believes the human body is limited for a reason. To {PAWN_objective}, artificial body parts and xenogenes are unethical and disgusting.

GreatMemory_0.Name: Great memory
GreatMemory_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a fantastic memory for detail. {PAWN_pronoun} will lose unused skills at half the rate of other people.

Tough_0.Name: Tough
Tough_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has thick skin, dense flesh, and durable bones. {PAWN_pronoun} takes much less damage than other people from the same blows. {PAWN_pronoun} is extremely hard to kill.

TorturedArtist_0.Name: Tortured artist
TorturedArtist_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} feels alienated and misunderstood by other human beings. {PAWN_pronoun} will have a constant mood debuff, but gain a chance (50%) to get a creativity inspiration after a mental break.

Gourmand_0.Name: Gourmand
Gourmand_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s life revolves around food. {PAWN_pronoun} gets hungry quickly, and will occasionally be overcome with the urge to eat ravenously, even when not hungry.

QuickSleeper_0.Name: Quick sleeper
QuickSleeper_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} doesn't need as much sleep as the average person. Whether {PAWN_pronoun}'s sleeping on a bed or on the ground, {PAWN_pronoun} will be fully rested in about two thirds the usual time.

SpeedOffset_-1.Name: Slowpoke
SpeedOffset_-1.Description: [PAWN_name] is always falling behind the group whenever [PAWN_pronoun] goes anywhere.

SpeedOffset_1.Name: Fast walker
SpeedOffset_1.Description: [PAWN_name] likes to be where [PAWN_pronoun]'s going. [PAWN_pronoun] walks quicker than most people.

SpeedOffset_2.Name: Jogger
SpeedOffset_2.Description: [PAWN_name] always moves with a sense of urgency - so much so that others often fail to keep up.

DrugDesire_2.Name: Chemical fascination
DrugDesire_2.Description: [PAWN_name] is utterly fascinated with chemical sources of enjoyment Consuming recreational drugs will create a good mood, while abstaining will lead to increasing frustration over time and possibly drug binges [PAWN_pronoun] will ignore directives to not use recreational drugs, and will consume more than a normal person.

DrugDesire_1.Name: Chemical interest
DrugDesire_1.Description: [PAWN_name] has an unusual interest in chemical sources of enjoyment Consuming recreational drugs will create a good mood, while abstaining will lead to increasing frustration over time and possible drug binges [PAWN_pronoun] will ignore directives to not use recreational drugs, and will consume more than a normal person.

DrugDesire_-1.Name: Teetotaler
DrugDesire_-1.Description: [PAWN_name] abhors the idea of gaining pleasure from chemicals. [PAWN_pronoun] strictly avoids alcohol and recreational drugs.

NaturalMood_2.Name: Sanguine
NaturalMood_2.Description: [PAWN_name] is just naturally upbeat about [PAWN_possessive] situation, pretty much all the time, no matter what it is.

NaturalMood_1.Name: Optimist
NaturalMood_1.Description: [PAWN_name] is naturally optimistic about life. It's hard to get [PAWN_objective] down.

NaturalMood_-1.Name: Pessimist
NaturalMood_-1.Description: [PAWN_name] tends to look on the bad side of life.

NaturalMood_-2.Name: Depressive
NaturalMood_-2.Description: [PAWN_name] is perenially unhappy. [PAWN_pronoun] has trouble sustaining a good mood even when everything is fine.

Nerves_2.Name: Iron-willed
Nerves_2.Description: [PAWN_name]'s will is an iron shield. [PAWN_pronoun] keeps going through thick and thin, when others broke down long before.

Nerves_1.Name: Steadfast
Nerves_1.Description: [PAWN_name] is mentally tough and won't break down under stresses that would crack most people.

Nerves_-2.Name: Volatile
Nerves_-2.Description: [PAWN_name] is on a hair-trigger all the time. [PAWN_pronoun] is the first to break in any tough situation.

Neurotic_1.Name: Neurotic
Neurotic_1.Description: [PAWN_name] likes to have things squared away. [PAWN_pronoun] will work harder than most to attain this state of affairs, but [PAWN_possessive] nerves can get the better of [PAWN_objective].

Neurotic_2.Name: Very neurotic
Neurotic_2.Description: [PAWN_name] feels constantly nervous about everything that has to get done [PAWN_pronoun] will work extremely hard to attain this state of affairs, but [PAWN_possessive] nerves can easily get the better of [PAWN_objective].

Industriousness_2.Name: Industrious
Industriousness_2.Description: [PAWN_name] has an easy time staying on-task and focused, and gets things done much faster than the average person.

Industriousness_1.Name: Hard worker
Industriousness_1.Description: [PAWN_name] is a natural hard worker and will finish tasks faster than most.

Industriousness_-2.Name: Slothful
Industriousness_-2.Description: [PAWN_name] loves idleness and hates anything productive. [PAWN_pronoun] moves slowly and rarely stays focused on a task.

PsychicSensitivity_2.Name: Psychically hypersensitive
PsychicSensitivity_2.Description: [PAWN_name]'s mind is like a psychic tuning fork. [PAWN_pronoun] is extremely sensitive to psychic phenomena.

PsychicSensitivity_1.Name: Psychically sensitive
PsychicSensitivity_1.Description: [PAWN_name]'s mind is unusually sensitive to psychic phenomena.

PsychicSensitivity_-1.Name: Psychically dull
PsychicSensitivity_-1.Description: [PAWN_name]'s mind is psychically out of tune with others. [PAWN_pronoun] isn't as affected by psychic phenomena.

PsychicSensitivity_-2.Name: Psychically deaf
PsychicSensitivity_-2.Description: [PAWN_name]'s mind works on a psychic frequency different from everyone else. [PAWN_pronoun] just isn't affected by psychic phenomena.

ShootingAccuracy_1.Name: Careful shooter
ShootingAccuracy_1.Description: [PAWN_name] takes more time to aim when shooting. [PAWN_pronoun] shoots less often than others, but with more accuracy.

ShootingAccuracy_-1.Name: Trigger-happy
ShootingAccuracy_-1.Description: Pew! Pew! Pew! [PAWN_name] just likes pulling the trigger. [PAWN_pronoun] shoots faster than others, but less accurately.

Beauty_2.Name: Beautiful
Beauty_2.Description: [PAWN_name] is exceptionally beautiful, with an exotic-yet-familiar facial structure and an arresting gaze People are attracted to [PAWN_objective] before [PAWN_pronoun] even opens [PAWN_possessive] mouth.

Beauty_1.Name: Pretty
Beauty_1.Description: [PAWN_name] has a pretty face, which predisposes people to like [PAWN_objective].

Beauty_-1.Name: Ugly
Beauty_-1.Description: [PAWN_name] is somewhat ugly. This subtly repels others during social interactions.

Beauty_-2.Name: Staggeringly ugly
Beauty_-2.Description: [PAWN_name] is staggeringly ugly [PAWN_possessive] face looks like a cross between a drawing by an untalented child, a malformed fetus in a jar of formaldehyde, and a piece of modern art Others must exert conscious effort to look at [PAWN_objective] while conversing.

Immunity_1.Name: Super-immune
Immunity_1.Description: [PAWN_name] has a naturally powerful immune system. [PAWN_pronoun] will gain immunity much faster than a normal person would, and can survive illnesses that would kill others.

Immunity_-1.Name: Sickly
Immunity_-1.Description: [PAWN_name] has an awful immune system. [PAWN_pronoun] gets sick more often than usual, frequently with illnesses that nobody in the colony has been afflicted by.

Delicate_0.Name: Delicate
Delicate_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has fragile skin and bones. {PAWN_pronoun} takes more damage than other people from the same blows.

Recluse_0.Name: Recluse
Recluse_0.Description: The fewer people in {PAWN_nameDef}'s faction, the happier {PAWN_pronoun} is. Being alone is best of all.

PerfectMemory_0.Name: Perfect memory
PerfectMemory_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has outstanding memory, both in terms of retaining information but also muscle memory. {PAWN_possessive} skills will never decay.

Occultist_0.Name: Occultist
Occultist_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has deep knowledge of the twisted patterns of dark psychic energy {PAWN_pronoun} can study unnatural entities faster than others {PAWN_pronoun} will also periodically teach this inhuman knowledge to others when {PAWN_pronoun} gets the chance.

Joyous_0.Name: Joyous
Joyous_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has the ability to make everyone feel better and inspire them to be the best version of themselves.

BodyMastery_0.Name: Body mastery
BodyMastery_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} doesn't have basic needs like eating, sleeping, or comfort. {PAWN_possessive} body is driven by some unknown mechanism, which has turned {PAWN_possessive} eyes completely white.

Disturbing_0.Name: Disturbing
Disturbing_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is a peculiar person who seems fixated on horrendous ideas. Talking to {PAWN_objective} is often upsetting.

VoidFascination_0.Name: Void fascination
VoidFascination_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is strangely intrigued by unnatural entities and is easily enthralled by them.

Trustworthy_0.Name: Trustworthy
Trustworthy_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is someone you can trust with your innermost thoughts. If you ask {PAWN_objective} to keep something to {PAWN_objective}self, {PAWN_pronoun} will.

Manipulative_0.Name: Manipulative
Manipulative_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is socially manipulative {PAWN_pronoun} doesn't always talk ill of people, but if {PAWN_pronoun} doesn't like someone, {PAWN_pronoun} will try to turn the rest of the colony against them.

Peacemaker_0.Name: Peacemaker
Peacemaker_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} just can't stand other people fighting. {PAWN_pronoun} will always try to persuade others to put aside their differences..

Gushing_0.Name: Gushing
Gushing_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} doesn't have a particular problem keeping other people's secrets, but can't help over sharing {PAWN_possessive} own.

CompulsiveLiar_0.Name: Compulsive liar
CompulsiveLiar_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a difficult relationship with the truth. This causes {PAWN_objective} to have difficult relationships with other colonists, as well.

AM_Ahimsa_0.Name: Vow of nonviolence
AM_Ahimsa_0.Description: A strict principle of nonviolence which applies to all living things.

RimScent_Anosmic_0.Name: Anosmic
RimScent_Anosmic_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has no sense of smell. While {PAWN_pronoun} cannot enjoy pleasant aromas, {PAWN_pronoun} is also completely immune to foul odors, smoke, and biological stenches.

RimScent_KeenNose_0.Name: Keen nose
RimScent_KeenNose_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} possesses an unnaturally sharp sense of smell. {PAWN_pronoun} is twice as sensitive to all smells.

RimScent_Dysosmic_0.Name: Dysosmic
RimScent_Dysosmic_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s olfactory system is wired backwards. {PAWN_pronoun} finds the smell of rot, filth, or smoke strangely alluring, while fresh rain or clean air makes {PAWN_objective} feel uneasy.

VAEI_Inhumanized_0.Name: Inhumanized
VAEI_Inhumanized_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s mind is dominated by the psychic patterns of the void They are completely disconnected from human concerns of family, friendship, and love Their experience of reality is distant and muted, guided by the psychic rhythm of a dark hyperintelligence.

VAEI_VoidTouched_0.Name: Void touched
VAEI_VoidTouched_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has seen the depths of the void and drank from its essence It lives inside them still, guiding their actions and twisting their flesh It has turned their hair brittle and white They no longer need sleep or comfort The void provides for them.

VAEI_Germaphobe_0.Name: Germaphobe
VAEI_Germaphobe_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is terrified of germs and contamination, leading to excessively slow and meticulous cleaning, but due to the careful nature will never contract flu, malaria, or plague.

VAEI_Noncommittal_0.Name: Noncommittal
VAEI_Noncommittal_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is desperately afraid of commitment. {PAWN_pronoun} will actively refuse any attachment to others, and will never form any new relationships.

VAEI_Unstable_0.Name: Impulsive
VAEI_Unstable_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s emotional foundation is fragile, making {PAWN_objective} significantly more prone to crumbling under stress {PAWN_pronoun} struggle to handle pressure, which often leads to breakdowns in challenging situations.

VAEI_Distractable_0.Name: Distractable
VAEI_Distractable_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} hyperfocuses on certain things when {PAWN_pronoun} feel like it, but most of the time {PAWN_pronoun} will struggle to concentrate on {PAWN_possessive} task, severely affecting {PAWN_possessive} work speed.

VAEI_MoodSwings_0.Name: Mood swings
VAEI_MoodSwings_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} suffers from severe mood swings that can last anything between a day and a quadrum. One day {PAWN_pronoun} might be extremely happy, whilst the next day - extremely sad.

VME_Elder_0.Name: Elder
VME_Elder_0.Description: Either the body or mind of {PAWN_nameDef} is one of insight and experience. While some find them old fashioned, others will respect their guidance.
VME_Elder_0.ModSource: Vanilla Ideology Expanded - Memes and Structures

VPE_Thrall_0.Name: Thrall
VPE_Thrall_0.Description: Psychic enthrallment caused by incredibly strong mental influence. Thralls don't need to sleep or have recreation, but are unable to do skilled work and engage in social interactions.

SEX_Solitary_0.Name: Solitary
SEX_Solitary_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is comfortable with isolation. {PAWN_pronoun} does not have a need for intimacy.

SEX_Affectionate_0.Name: Affectionate
SEX_Affectionate_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is quite the social butterfly. {PAWN_pronoun} has an increased need for intimacy.

ST_Manipulative_0.Name: Manipulative
ST_Manipulative_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is good at getting {PAWN_possessive} way. Be it love bombing or gaslighting, {PAWN_possessive} victims rarely notice what’s truly going on.

ST_Naive_0.Name: Naive
ST_Naive_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} was taught everyone is good and kind. Maybe one day {PAWN_pronoun} will learn the lesson the hard way.

ST_Narcissist_0.Name: Narcissist
ST_Narcissist_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} believes in pretty privilege. {PAWN_pronoun} is desperate to achieve flawless beauty by any means.

ST_HealthNut_0.Name: Health Nut
ST_HealthNut_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef}’s body is a temple, {PAWN_pronoun} only eats food to survive. {PAWN_pronoun} is here for a long time, not a good time.

ST_Emotional_0.Name: Emotional
ST_Emotional_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} feels {PAWN_possessive} emotions more profoundly and experiences greater mood swings. {PAWN_pronoun} often cries to release any frustration.

ST_Paranoid_0.Name: Paranoid
ST_Paranoid_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} believes good luck is an illusion and bad things are bound to happen. {PAWN_pronoun} is always ready for the worst case scenario.

ST_Goofball_0.Name: Goofball
ST_Goofball_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} acts funny in the day-to-day life. {PAWN_possessive} silly nature often amuses others.

ST_Loyal_0.Name: Loyal
ST_Loyal_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is never gonna give you up.

ST_PartyAnimal_0.Name: Party animal
ST_PartyAnimal_0.Description: For {PAWN_nameDef}, every season is party season!

ST_Insane_0.Name: Insane
ST_Insane_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} always seem out of place. No one knows what’s going on in {PAWN_possessive} head, not even {PAWN_objective}self.

ST_Proper_0.Name: Proper
ST_Proper_0.Description: Follow the dress code, say the right word. {PAWN_nameDef} has immaculate manners that navigate {PAWN_objective} through every social occasion.

ST_Grumpy_0.Name: Grumpy
ST_Grumpy_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} always seems annoyed, especially on a Monday. Others around {PAWN_objective} are constantly afraid to trigger {PAWN_possessive} grumbles.

ST_Shy_0.Name: Shy
ST_Shy_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} struggles to socialise with other people, {PAWN_pronoun} especially cherish it while being on the receiving end of kindness Over the time, {PAWN_nameDef} have learned to spend more time on organising and introspecting {PAWN_objective}self.

ST_Materialistic_0.Name: Materialistic
ST_Materialistic_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes buying and bragging about {PAWN_possessive} new possessions.

ST_Vegan_0.Name: Vegan
ST_Vegan_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} avoids eating meat. {PAWN_pronoun} believes animals should not be treated as commodities and knows how to use plants to make delicious meals.

ST_Devout_0.Name: Devout
ST_Devout_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} devotes {PAWN_possessive} body and soul to what {PAWN_pronoun} believes. Somehow, {PAWN_possessive} prayers get answered.

ST_Procrastinator_0.Name: Procrastinator
ST_Procrastinator_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes to put things off until the last minute. {PAWN_pronoun} still manages to get those tasks done but the results are usually lacklustre.

ST_NonCommital_0.Name: Non-committal
ST_NonCommital_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} becomes tense after a while in the same job or relationship. {PAWN_possessive} fear of commitment facilitates change.

ST_HighMaintenance_0.Name: High maintenance
ST_HighMaintenance_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} can feel a pea under twenty mattresses while sleeping. {PAWN_pronoun} is born blue blood with expensive taste and trivial problems.

ST_FamilyOriented_0.Name: Family oriented
ST_FamilyOriented_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} want big families and enjoy being surrounded by children. {PAWN_pronoun} will make an excellent parent!

ST_SteadyHands_0.Name: Steady hands
ST_SteadyHands_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a pair of steady hands that never shakes or even trembles under pressure.

ST_Daredevil_0.Name: Daredevil
ST_Daredevil_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} enjoys chaos and takes the extreme side in life. {PAWN_pronoun} can’t quit the adrenaline rush from being reckless.

ST_Chatterbox_0.Name: Chatterbox
ST_Chatterbox_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes to talk and {PAWN_pronoun} sure talks a lot. People around {PAWN_objective} have started to develop immunity to whatever {PAWN_pronoun} says.

ST_Bookworm_0.Name: Bookworm
ST_Bookworm_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a deep love for reading. {PAWN_pronoun} reads fast and enjoys expanding {PAWN_possessive} knowledge this way.

ST_Handy_0.Name: Handy
ST_Handy_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes to get on with {PAWN_possessive} hands and tinkers around. {PAWN_pronoun} has the natural aptitude of handling those tiny precision components.

ST_Virtuoso_0.Name: Virtuoso
ST_Virtuoso_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a natural gift with musical and instruments. It is as if the music {PAWN_pronoun} plays lingered in the air.

ST_TechWhiz_0.Name: Tech whiz
ST_TechWhiz_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is brilliant with computers and technology. {PAWN_pronoun} can hack into other people’s data and security systems with ease.

ST_Gambler_0.Name: Gambler
ST_Gambler_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} believes in {PAWN_possessive} own luck. Despite the crippling addiction, {PAWN_possessive} luck certainly tips in a different direction on the battlefield.

ST_Childish_0.Name: Childish
ST_Childish_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} never lost that childlike wonder. {PAWN_pronoun} sees things through the eyes of a child and need to be constantly entertained.

ST_Nosy_0.Name: Nosy
ST_Nosy_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} ignores others' boundaries and likes pressing for more information, this often rubs people the wrong way.

ST_HugePower_0.Name: Huge power
ST_HugePower_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is noted for {PAWN_possessive} incredible strength {PAWN_pronoun}'s naturally strong without the need to frequent the gym However, delicate tasks like medical operations pose a huge challenge, as the sheer force of {PAWN_possessive} grip hinders any precision.

ST_Observant_0.Name: Observant
ST_Observant_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a pair of keen eyes that scans through every detail and miss no strange things. {PAWN_pronoun} can even spot distant ships while stargazing through a telescope.

ST_Zen_0.Name: Zen
ST_Zen_0.Description:
{PAWN_nameDef} takes time to discover beauty in everything. {PAWN_pronoun} sees the world in a grain of sand.

To {PAWN_objective}, actively sabotaging life is a despicable act.

Isekai_Protagonist_0.Name: Protagonist
Isekai_Protagonist_0.Description:
This individual is the Protagonist — chosen by fate itself They gain experience at an extraordinary rate and grow faster than anyone else • x10 XP multiplier
• +2 bonus stat points per level
• Cannot have: Antagonist, Regressor, Summoned Hero

Isekai_Antagonist_0.Name: Antagonist
Isekai_Antagonist_0.Description:
This individual walks the path of the Antagonist — feared and reviled They grow powerful through conflict, gaining massive combat bonuses, but their very presence unsettles others • x8 XP multiplier
• +25% melee damage
• +10% move speed
• -25% social impact
• -25 opinion from all other pawns
• Cannot have: Protagonist, Summoned Hero

Isekai_Reincarnated_0.Name: Reincarnated
Isekai_Reincarnated_0.Description:
This individual has been reincarnated — reborn into a new life with memories of the old Their level and stats were reset, but they retained their constellation progress and earned powerful growth bonuses • Resets level to 1 and all stats to base (New Game+)
• x5 XP multiplier
• +10 bonus star points
• +1 star point every 3 levels instead of 5
• Constellation tree progress preserved
• Cannot have: Protagonist, Antagonist, Hollow Core

Isekai_Regressor_0.Name: Regressor
Isekai_Regressor_0.Description:
This individual has regressed — returned to the past with fragments of future knowledge They level faster and can freely readapt their constellation at any time • x4 XP multiplier
• Free constellation respec (always)
• Cannot have: Protagonist

Isekai_SummonedHero_0.Name: Summoned hero
Isekai_SummonedHero_0.Description:
This individual was summoned from another world as a hero They gain power rapidly and are mentally resilient, but the displacement from their home world weighs on them • x3 XP multiplier
• +1 bonus stat point per level
• Highly resistant to mental breaks
• +25% social impact
• -8 mood (displaced from home)
• Cannot have: Protagonist, Antagonist

Isekai_NaturalTalent_0.Name: Natural talent
Isekai_NaturalTalent_0.Description:
Born with exceptional latent potential. This individual earns bonus star points as they level, allowing them to unlock more constellation nodes.

• +1 bonus star point every 5 levels (2 instead of 1)

Isekai_Prodigy_0.Name: Prodigy
Isekai_Prodigy_0.Description:
A genius who absorbs knowledge at an astonishing rate. Their mind operates on another level entirely.

• x2 XP multiplier
• +50% research speed

Isekai_LateBloomer_0.Name: Late bloomer
Isekai_LateBloomer_0.Description:
Starts slow but becomes unstoppable XP gain scales dramatically with level — weak early, godlike late • Level 1-10: x0.5 XP
• Level 11-25: x1.0 XP
• Level 26-50: x1.5 XP
• Level 51-100: x2.0 XP
• Level 101+: x3.0 XP

Isekai_QuickLearner_0.Name: Quick learner
Isekai_QuickLearner_0.Description:
Grows and gains power faster than most. A reliable, steady advantage in all situations.

• x1.5 XP multiplier

Isekai_SlowGrind_0.Name: Slow grind
Isekai_SlowGrind_0.Description:
Levels slowly but squeezes maximum potential from every level gained. Quality over speed.

• x0.5 XP multiplier
• +2 bonus stat points per level

Isekai_PowerSpike_0.Name: Power spike
Isekai_PowerSpike_0.Description:
Experiences sudden surges of power at regular intervals, gaining massive stat boosts at milestone levels.

• +5 bonus stat points every 10 levels

Isekai_AwakenedPotential_0.Name: Awakened potential
Isekai_AwakenedPotential_0.Description:
Dormant power awakens at level 25, dramatically increasing all stat effectiveness Before awakening, the pawn is unremarkable • Below level 25: -10% all stats
• Level 25+: +50% all stat effectiveness

Isekai_Genius_0.Name: Genius
Isekai_Genius_0.Description:
A towering intellect in a mediocre body. Mental stats grow twice as fast, but physical stats grow at half speed.

• INT and WIS stat gains doubled
• STR and VIT stat gains halved

Isekai_BattleManiac_0.Name: Battle maniac
Isekai_BattleManiac_0.Description:
Lives only for battle. Gains massively increased combat XP but is nearly incapable of learning from peaceful activities.

• x3 combat XP (damage, kills)
• x0.1 work/social XP
• +15% melee dodge chance

Isekai_BerserkerBlood_0.Name: Berserker blood
Isekai_BerserkerBlood_0.Description:
When wounded, primal rage surges through their veins The more they bleed, the harder they fight • Below 50% HP: +30% melee damage, +15% move speed
• Below 25% HP: +60% melee damage, +30% move speed
• -10% mental break threshold (easier to break)

Isekai_IronWill_0.Name: Iron will
Isekai_IronWill_0.Description:
An unbreakable mind forged through hardship. Nearly immune to mental breaks and pain, but emotionally distant.

• -25% mental break threshold
• +30% pain shock threshold
• -20% social impact

Isekai_GlassCannon_0.Name: Glass cannon
Isekai_GlassCannon_0.Description:
Devastatingly powerful but dangerously fragile. Every attack hits like a truck, but they can't take a hit.

• +50% melee damage
• +30% ranged combat effectiveness
• VIT effectiveness halved

Isekai_Fortress_0.Name: Fortress
Isekai_Fortress_0.Description:
An immovable defensive bastion. Incredibly tough and resistant to damage, but slow and lacks offensive punch.

• +20% natural armor (all types)
• -25% move speed
• -20% melee damage

Isekai_ShadowStep_0.Name: Shadow step
Isekai_ShadowStep_0.Description:
Moves like a shadow, nearly impossible to pin down. Exceptional evasion and speed, but lacks the constitution to take hits.

• +25% move speed
• +20% melee dodge chance
• -10% melee damage

Isekai_PredatorInstinct_0.Name: Predator's instinct
Isekai_PredatorInstinct_0.Description:
Possesses primal hunting instincts — an innate sense for combat and danger that enhances all fighting capabilities.

• +15% melee hit chance
• +15% shooting accuracy
• -15% trap spring chance

Isekai_Undying_0.Name: Undying
Isekai_Undying_0.Description:
Fate refuses to let this individual die When struck by a killing blow, they miraculously survive — but the experience leaves a permanent mark on their psyche • Cheat death: Survive lethal damage once every 3 days
• +20% pain shock threshold
• -5 mood (touched by death) after triggering

Isekai_Mighty_0.Name: Mighty
Isekai_Mighty_0.Description:
Blessed with exceptional physical strength but lacks finesse.

• STR stat effectiveness x1.5
• DEX stat effectiveness x0.75

Isekai_Agile_0.Name: Agile
Isekai_Agile_0.Description:
Graceful and quick with exceptional reflexes, but physically weaker.

• DEX stat effectiveness x1.5
• STR stat effectiveness x0.75

Isekai_Resilient_0.Name: Resilient
Isekai_Resilient_0.Description:
An iron constitution that shrugs off what would fell others, but spiritually dulled.

• VIT stat effectiveness x1.5
• WIS stat effectiveness x0.75

Isekai_Brilliant_0.Name: Brilliant
Isekai_Brilliant_0.Description:
A sharp analytical mind that processes information at incredible speeds, but socially awkward.

• INT stat effectiveness x1.5
• CHA stat effectiveness x0.75

Isekai_Enlightened_0.Name: Enlightened
Isekai_Enlightened_0.Description:
Deeply perceptive and spiritually attuned. Great wisdom comes at the cost of physical endurance.

• WIS stat effectiveness x1.5
• VIT stat effectiveness x0.75

Isekai_SilverTongue_0.Name: Silver tongue
Isekai_SilverTongue_0.Description:
A natural-born leader and diplomat whose words carry weight, but lacks analytical depth.

• CHA stat effectiveness x1.5
• INT stat effectiveness x0.75

Isekai_MerchantEye_0.Name: Merchant's eye
Isekai_MerchantEye_0.Description:
An innate sense for value and negotiation. Always gets the best deals.

• +25% trade price improvement
• +20% negotiation ability

Isekai_CraftsmanSoul_0.Name: Craftsman's soul
Isekai_CraftsmanSoul_0.Description:
A born artisan with an instinctive understanding of materials and construction. Everything they make is a cut above.

• +25% work speed (all types)
• +1 crafting quality tier chance

Isekai_BeastWhisperer_0.Name: Beast whisperer
Isekai_BeastWhisperer_0.Description:
Has an uncanny bond with animals Creatures of all kinds are drawn to this individual, making taming and training trivially easy • +40% tame animal chance
• +30% train animal chance
• +25% animal gather yield
• Animals won't attack unprovoked

Isekai_HealerTouch_0.Name: Healer's touch
Isekai_HealerTouch_0.Description:
Healing flows through their hands like magic. Their medical skills far exceed what training alone could explain.

• +30% medical tend quality
• +25% surgery success chance
• +20% immunity gain speed

Isekai_Lucky_0.Name: Lucky
Isekai_Lucky_0.Description:
Fortune favors them endlessly. Good things just seem to happen around this individual.

• +15% surgery success
• +10% shooting accuracy
• +10% trade prices
• +5 mood (feeling lucky)

Isekai_CursedLuck_0.Name: Cursed luck
Isekai_CursedLuck_0.Description:
Terrible luck plagues them, yet somehow they thrive in adversity Misfortune strengthens them in mysterious ways • x2 XP multiplier
• -15% surgery success
• -10% trade prices
• +20% melee damage
• -5 mood (cursed by fate)

Isekai_HollowCore_0.Name: Hollow core
Isekai_HollowCore_0.Description:
Their spiritual core is shattered — they can channel raw power but cannot form the connections needed for constellation skills • x3 XP multiplier
• Cannot unlock any constellation nodes
• No star points gained

Isekai_FragileVessel_0.Name: Fragile vessel
Isekai_FragileVessel_0.Description:
Their body wasn't built to contain this much power. They grow rapidly but their physical form deteriorates under the strain.

• x2.5 XP multiplier
• -50% max health
• VIT effectiveness halved

Isekai_EchoOfDefeat_0.Name: Echo of defeat
Isekai_EchoOfDefeat_0.Description:
Grows stronger through failure. Each defeat fuels their determination to improve.

• Permanent +10% XP bonus
• x2 XP for 3 days after being downed
• -5% melee damage

Isekai_SealedPower_0.Name: Sealed power
Isekai_SealedPower_0.Description:
Immense power sealed away, waiting to be unleashed Weak and stunted until the seal breaks at level 25, then gains an explosive power surge • Before level 25: -30% all stats, no star points
• At level 25: Seal breaks!
• After level 25: Double stat points per level (up to +2 bonus), +2 star points per 5 levels

Isekai_Rank_F_0.Name: Rank F
Isekai_Rank_F_0.Description: This individual is recognized as an F-Rank - the weakest classification. Others look down on them with pity or contempt, and their presence commands no respect.

Isekai_Rank_E_0.Name: Rank E
Isekai_Rank_E_0.Description: This individual is classified as E-Rank - below average but not completely worthless. They are often overlooked and struggle to gain recognition.

Isekai_Rank_D_0.Name: Rank D
Isekai_Rank_D_0.Description: This individual holds a D-Rank classification - thoroughly average. They neither stand out nor fall behind, blending into the crowd.

Isekai_Rank_C_0.Name: Rank C
Isekai_Rank_C_0.Description: This individual is recognized as C-Rank - a competent person above the common masses. They command modest respect and are seen as reliable.

Isekai_Rank_B_0.Name: Rank B
Isekai_Rank_B_0.Description: This individual has achieved B-Rank status - a skilled veteran worthy of respect. Their reputation precedes them, and others treat them with deference.

Isekai_Rank_A_0.Name: Rank A
Isekai_Rank_A_0.Description: This individual is an A-Rank elite - among the finest in existence. Their very presence commands attention, and they exude an aura of power and authority that few can match.

Isekai_Rank_S_0.Name: Rank S
Isekai_Rank_S_0.Description: This individual holds the legendary S-Rank - a hero of incredible power. Their name is spoken with reverence, and their mere glance can silence a room. Others feel humbled in their presence.

Isekai_Rank_SS_0.Name: Rank SS
Isekai_Rank_SS_0.Description: This individual has transcended to SS-Rank - a demigod walking among mortals Their power is the stuff of legends, and entire nations would pay any price to secure their loyalty They radiate an otherworldly magnificence.

Isekai_Rank_SSS_0.Name: Rank SSS
Isekai_Rank_SSS_0.Description: This individual has achieved the impossible - SSS-Rank, the absolute apex of existence They are a god among mortals, their power beyond comprehension Kingdoms would fall to possess them, and their very existence reshapes the world around them.

VFEP_WarcasketTrait_0.Name: Warcasket
VFEP_WarcasketTrait_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is entombed in a warcasket No amount of pain will have an effect on them, and they can never go into a pain shock or drop unconscious due to pain Because of how bulky the armor is and how much energy it takes to use it, {PAWN_nameDef} is not capable of doing any work.

VFEP_Shellcasket_0.Name: Shellcasket
VFEP_Shellcasket_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} was entombed in a warcasket, and then brutally pulled out of one The neural and nerve damage from being unplugged is so severe that {PAWN_nameDef} is in constant, agonizing pain and can barely assemble his thoughts Only installing {PAWN_nameDef} back in a warcasket can cure the symptoms.

PE_LowTechProficiency_0.Name: Low-tech proficient
PE_LowTechProficiency_0.Description: This person is proficient with low-tech equipment.

PE_FirearmProficiency_0.Name: Firearm proficient
PE_FirearmProficiency_0.Description: This person is proficient with firearm equipment.

PE_HighTechProficiency_0.Name: High-tech proficient
PE_HighTechProficiency_0.Description: This person is proficient with high-tech equipment.

PE_AnimalRidingProficiency_0.Name: Animal riding
PE_AnimalRidingProficiency_0.Description: This person is proficient with animal riding.

PE_AutomobileDrivingProficiency_0.Name: Automobile driving
PE_AutomobileDrivingProficiency_0.Description: This person is proficient with automobile driving.

PE_AerialPilotingProficiency_0.Name: Aerial piloting
PE_AerialPilotingProficiency_0.Description: This person is proficient with aerial piloting.

PE_OrbitalPilotingProficiency_0.Name: Orbital piloting
PE_OrbitalPilotingProficiency_0.Description: This person is proficient with orbital piloting.

PE_MuteProficiency_0.Name: Mute
PE_MuteProficiency_0.Description: This person has no understanding of language.

PE_BasicSpeechProficiency_0.Name: Basic speech
PE_BasicSpeechProficiency_0.Description: This person has a basic understanding of language and can speak it with half effectiveness.

PE_FluentSpeechProficiency_0.Name: Fluent speech
PE_FluentSpeechProficiency_0.Description: This person has a complete understanding of language and can speak it with full effectiveness.

VRE_Flirty_0.Name: Flirty
VRE_Flirty_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is always ready with a flirtatious comment or a playful compliment, lifting the spirits of those around {PAWN_objective} {PAWN_pronoun} has a knack for making others feel special and desired, however this may sometimes lead to complicated situations when {PAWN_possessive} playful intentions are misinterpreted.

VRE_Distressed_0.Name: Distressed
VRE_Distressed_0.Description: {PAWN_nameDef} is exceptionally empathetic and sensitive to the suffering of others Whenever {PAWN_pronoun} witnesses pain or hardship, it deeply affects {PAWN_objective}, resulting in memories of these events haunting {PAWN_nameDef} for a much longer time.
